title: sciothamnus collinus
intro: Sciothamnus collinus, also known as dwarf scotch broom, is a low-growing, evergreen shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Sciothamnus collinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sciothamnus collinus may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
